driver_subject: mtd: spi-nor: nxp-spifi: Make use of the helper function devm_platform_ioremap_resource_byname()
stage1_reason: Two of three commits explicitly migrate from platform_get_resource_byname()+devm_ioremap_resource() to devm_platform_ioremap_resource_byname(), which is a kernel API consolidation. The third commit fixes clock management API usage.
stage2_reason: Driver commits explicitly migrate to devm_platform_ioremap_resource_byname() helper, which was introduced by kernel commit c9c8641d3ebd in v5.5 timeframe, providing direct API consolidation.
